chapter_title: Jefferson & Orange Cnty. Pilots Licensing and Regul. Act

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 69. Jefferson & Orange Cnty. Pilots Licensing and Regul. Act
##### § 69.042 — Deputy Branch Pilot

A person who has been issued a deputy branch pilot’s certificate may not be issued a deputy branch pilot’s certificate before the fifth anniversary of the date the person was previously issued a deputy branch pilot’s certificate.

*Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 745, Sec. 1, eff. June 20, 2003.*

subsections.text: A person who has been issued a deputy branch pilot’s certificate may not be issued a deputy branch pilot’s certificate before the fifth anniversary of the date the person was previously issued a deputy branch pilot’s certificate.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 745, Sec. 1, eff. June 20, 2003.
